'''Kichiir''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] associate of Rebel agents [[Xenon Nnaksta]] and [[Adazian Liebke]].<ref name="air">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

Nnaksta and Liebke asked Kichiir and other associates for help when they were being chased by bounty hunter [[Ssach'thirix]]. Kichiir and the others managed to turn the tables on Ssach'thirix, bruising and beating him, but Ssach'thirix survived.<ref name="air" />

Kichiir joined the [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]] [[Eclipse Team]]'s [[Lightning Tech Squadron]] and was later injured while attempting to stop the theft of [[Meleenium/Legends|Meleenium]] from the [[Qua'Tahc]] mines on [[Af'El/Legends|Af'El]].
